mentions.note: Beat on better-than-feared quarter; 20 consecutive comp growth quarters; Chili's #1 traffic/alcohol brand; fighting shrinkflation with value. Raised FY guidance.

Blowout quarter with +8.6% Chili's same-store sales vs. 6.1% estimate; bacon upgrades (50% more = 3x total), ribs upgrades (50% more bones, domestic), menu simplification (quarter eliminated), value focus (per-person average $3-4 less than competitors); guest satisfaction tracking at all-time low 2.1% with problems; stock 'about to burst out' per Cramer.
